Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a single product available for sale in the e-commerce store.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

price.description: The current price of the product.

imageUrls.description: An array of URLs for product images, used for galleries.

categoryId.description: Reference to the Category this product belongs to. (Relationship: Category 1:N Product)

rating.description: The average rating of the product based on user reviews.

numReviews.description: The total number of reviews submitted for this product.

specifications.description: A list of product specifications as key-value pairs (e.g., color, size, material).

stockQuantity.description: The number of units of this product currently in stock.

brand.description: The brand name of the product.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added to the catalog.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product information was last updated.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Organizes products into logical groups for easier browsing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

name.description: The name of the product category.

description.description: A brief description of the category.

imageUrl.description: URL of an image representing the category, often used for UI display.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Represents a user-submitted review for a specific product.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Review entity.

productId.description: Reference to the Product being reviewed. (Relationship: Product 1:N Review)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who submitted the review. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Review)

rating.description: The rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars).

comment.description: The textual comment provided by the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the review was submitted.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores non-authentication related user data, linked to an external authentication system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity, corresponding to the external authentication UID.

defaultShippingAddressId.description: Reference to the user's default shipping Address. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Address)

addressIds.description: References to all Addresses associated with this user. (Relationship: UserProfile N:N Address)

orderIds.description: References to all Orders placed by this user. (Relationship: UserProfile N:N Order)

wishlistProductIds.description: References to Products added to the user's wishlist. (Relationship: UserProfile N:N Product)

Address.title: Address
Address.description: Stores a physical address used for shipping or billing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Address entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile this address belongs to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Address)

fullName.description: The full name of the recipient.

state.description: The state or province of the address.

zipCode.description: The postal or zip code of the address.

phoneNumber.description: A contact phone number for the address.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a completed or pending purchase transaction by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who placed the order. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Order)

orderDate.description: Timestamp when the order was placed.

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the order, including taxes and shipping.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., 'Pending', 'Processing', 'Shipped', 'Delivered', 'Cancelled').

shippingAddressId.description: Reference to the Address used for shipping this order. (Relationship: Address 1:N Order)

orderItemIds.description: References to all OrderItems included in this order. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

paymentMethod.description: The method used for payment (e.g., 'Credit Card', 'UPI', 'Cash on Delivery').

transactionId.description: Optional identifier provided by the payment gateway.

estimatedDeliveryDate.description: Optional estimated date of delivery for the order.

trackingNumber.description: Optional tracking number for shipping the order.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a specific product and its quantity within a larger order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order this item belongs to. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product purchased. (Relationship: Product 1:N OrderItem)

quantity.description: The quantity of the product ordered.

priceAtPurchase.description: The price of the product at the time the order was placed.

subtotal.description: The calculated subtotal for this specific item (quantity * priceAtPurchase).

CartItem.title: CartItem
CartItem.description: Represents a product and its quantity currently in a user's shopping cart.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CartItem entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile whose cart this item is in. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N CartItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product added to the cart. (Relationship: Product 1:N CartItem)

quantity.description: The quantity of the product in the cart.

addedAt.description: Timestamp when the item was added to the cart.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

firestore.reasoning: Standard structure for e-commerce with hierarchical ownership.
